data.description: Build AI-native spreadsheets. Univer is a full-stack framework for creating and editing spreadsheets on both web and server. With Univer Platform, Univer Spreadsheets is driven directly through natural language. - dream-num/univer

dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e📈 Univer is designed to support \u003cstrong\u003espreadsheets\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003edocuments\u003c/strong\u003e and \u003cstrong\u003epresentation\u003c/strong\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🧙‍♀️ Univer is \u003cstrong\u003eisomorphic\u003c/strong\u003e. It can run both on browsers and Node.js (in the future, mobile devices as well), with the same API.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e⚙️ Univer is easily \u003cstrong\u003eembeddable\u003c/strong\u003e, allowing seamless integration into your applications.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🎇 Univer is \u003cstrong\u003epowerful\u003c/strong\u003e, offering a wide range of features including \u003cstrong\u003eformulas\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003econditional formatting\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003edata validation\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003efiltering\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003ecollaborative editing\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003eprinting\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003eimport \u0026amp; export\u003c/strong\u003e and more features on the horizon.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🔌 Univer is \u003cstrong\u003ehighly extensible\u003c/strong\u003e, thanks to its \u003cem\u003eplug-in architecture\u003c/em\u003e that makes it a delight for developers to implement their unique requirements on the top of Univer.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e💄 Univer is \u003cstrong\u003ehighly customizable\u003c/strong\u003e, allowing you to personalize its appearance using \u003cem\u003ethemes\u003c/em\u003e. It also provides support for internationalization (i18n).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🥤 Univer is \u003cstrong\u003eeasy to work with\u003c/strong\u003e. The \u003cem\u003ePresets\u003c/em\u003e \u0026amp; \u003cem\u003eFacade API\u003c/em\u003e make it easy to hands on.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e⚡ Univer in \u003cstrong\u003eperformant\u003c/strong\u003e.\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e✏️ Univer boasts an efficient \u003cem\u003erendering engine\u003c/em\u003e based on canvas, capable of rendering various document types flawlessly. The rendering engines supports advanced typesetting features such as \u003cem\u003epunctuation squeezing\u003c/em\u003e, \u003cem\u003etext and image layout\u003c/em\u003e and \u003cem\u003escroll buffering\u003c/em\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🧮 Univer incorporates a lightning-fast \u003cem\u003eformula engine\u003c/em\u003e that can operate in Web Workers or even on the server side.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🌌 Univer is a \u003cstrong\u003ehighly integrated\u003c/strong\u003e system. Documents, spreadsheets and slides can interoperate with each others and even rendered on the same canvas, allowing information and data flow within Univer.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e✨ Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--features\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: ✨ Features\" href=\"#-features\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eUniver provides a wide range of features for spreadsheets, documents and presentations. Features\u003c/strong\u003e: Univer supports core spreadsheet functionality, including cells, rows, columns, worksheets, and workbooks.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFormulas\u003c/strong\u003e: Extensive support for various formulas, including mathematical, statistical, logical, text, date and time, lookup and reference, engineering, financial, and information formulas.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePermissions\u003c/strong\u003e: Allows restricting access to specific elements.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eNumber Formatting\u003c/strong\u003e: Supports formatting numbers based on specific criteria.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHyperlinks\u003c/strong\u003e: Enables linking to external websites, email addresses, and other locations within a spreadsheet.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFloating Images\u003c/strong\u003e: Allows inserting images into a spreadsheet and positioning them anywhere on the sheet.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFind \u0026amp; Replace\u003c/strong\u003e: Provides the ability to search for specific text within a spreadsheet and replace it with other text.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFiltering\u003c/strong\u003e: Allows filtering data based on specific criteria.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSorting\u003c/strong\u003e: Allows sorting data based on specific criteria.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eData Validation\u003c/strong\u003e: Supports restricting the type of data that can be entered into a cell.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eConditional Formatting\u003c/strong\u003e: Supports applying formatting to cells based on specific criteria.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eComments\u003c/strong\u003e: Enables adding comments to cells to provide additional information.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCross-highlighting\u003c/strong\u003e: Supports displaying cross-highlighting in spreadsheets to help users quickly locate selected cells.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eZen Editor\u003c/strong\u003e: Provides a distraction-free editing experience with a clean interface and minimal distractions.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePivot Tables\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Supports pivot tables, allowing users to summarize and analyze data.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSparklines\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-2-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Supports sparklines, which are small charts that fit within a cell to provide a visual representation of data.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePrinting\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-3-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Allows printing a spreadsheet or exporting it to PDF.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eImport \u0026amp; Export\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-4-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Support for importing and exporting data in XLSX.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCharts\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-5-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Supports various types of charts, including bar charts, line charts, pie charts, scatter plots, and more.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCollaborative Editing\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-6-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Supports multiple users editing a spreadsheet simultaneously. File history and recovering are also provided.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEditing History\u003c/strong\u003e\u003csup\u003e\u003ca href=\"#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" id=\"user-content-fnref-1-7-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6\" data-footnote-ref=\"\" aria-describedby=\"footnote-label\"\u003e1\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/sup\u003e: Allows users to view and restore previous versions of a spreadsheet.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🌈 Highlights</h2><a id="user-content--highlights" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🌈 Highlights" href="#-highlights"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>📈 Univer is designed to support <strong>spreadsheets</strong>, <strong>documents</strong> and <strong>presentation</strong>.</li>
<li>🧙‍♀️ Univer is <strong>isomorphic</strong>. It can run both on browsers and Node.js (in the future, mobile devices as well), with the same API.</li>
<li>⚙️ Univer is easily <strong>embeddable</strong>, allowing seamless integration into your applications.</li>
<li>🎇 Univer is <strong>powerful</strong>, offering a wide range of features including <strong>formulas</strong>, <strong>conditional formatting</strong>, <strong>data validation</strong>, <strong>filtering</strong>, <strong>collaborative editing</strong>, <strong>printing</strong>, <strong>import & export</strong> and more features on the horizon.</li>
<li>🔌 Univer is <strong>highly extensible</strong>, thanks to its <em>plug-in architecture</em> that makes it a delight for developers to implement their unique requirements on the top of Univer.</li>
<li>💄 Univer is <strong>highly customizable</strong>, allowing you to personalize its appearance using <em>themes</em>. It also provides support for internationalization (i18n).</li>
<li>🥤 Univer is <strong>easy to work with</strong>. The <em>Presets</em> & <em>Facade API</em> make it easy to hands on.</li>
<li>⚡ Univer in <strong>performant</strong>.
<ul dir="auto">
<li>✏️ Univer boasts an efficient <em>rendering engine</em> based on canvas, capable of rendering various document types flawlessly. The rendering engines supports advanced typesetting features such as <em>punctuation squeezing</em>, <em>text and image layout</em> and <em>scroll buffering</em>.</li>
<li>🧮 Univer incorporates a lightning-fast <em>formula engine</em> that can operate in Web Workers or even on the server side.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>🌌 Univer is a <strong>highly integrated</strong> system. Documents, spreadsheets and slides can interoperate with each others and even rendered on the same canvas, allowing information and data flow within Univer.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">✨ Features</h2><a id="user-content--features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ✨ Features" href="#-features"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Univer provides a wide range of features for spreadsheets, documents and presentations. Here are some of the key features:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">📊 Univer Sheets</h3><a id="user-content--univer-sheets" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📊 Univer Sheets" href="#-univer-sheets"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Core Features</strong>: Univer supports core spreadsheet functionality, including cells, rows, columns, worksheets, and workbooks.</li>
<li><strong>Formulas</strong>: Extensive support for various formulas, including mathematical, statistical, logical, text, date and time, lookup and reference, engineering, financial, and information formulas.</li>
<li><strong>Permissions</strong>: Allows restricting access to specific elements.</li>
<li><strong>Number Formatting</strong>: Supports formatting numbers based on specific criteria.</li>
<li><strong>Hyperlinks</strong>: Enables linking to external websites, email addresses, and other locations within a spreadsheet.</li>
<li><strong>Floating Images</strong>: Allows inserting images into a spreadsheet and positioning them anywhere on the sheet.</li>
<li><strong>Find & Replace</strong>: Provides the ability to search for specific text within a spreadsheet and replace it with other text.</li>
<li><strong>Filtering</strong>: Allows filtering data based on specific criteria.</li>
<li><strong>Sorting</strong>: Allows sorting data based on specific criteria.</li>
<li><strong>Data Validation</strong>: Supports restricting the type of data that can be entered into a cell.</li>
<li><strong>Conditional Formatting</strong>: Supports applying formatting to cells based on specific criteria.</li>
<li><strong>Comments</strong>: Enables adding comments to cells to provide additional information.</li>
<li><strong>Cross-highlighting</strong>: Supports displaying cross-highlighting in spreadsheets to help users quickly locate selected cells.</li>
<li><strong>Zen Editor</strong>: Provides a distraction-free editing experience with a clean interface and minimal distractions.</li>
<li><strong>Pivot Tables</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Supports pivot tables, allowing users to summarize and analyze data.</li>
<li><strong>Sparklines</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-2-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Supports sparklines, which are small charts that fit within a cell to provide a visual representation of data.</li>
<li><strong>Printing</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-3-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Allows printing a spreadsheet or exporting it to PDF.</li>
<li><strong>Import & Export</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-4-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Support for importing and exporting data in XLSX.</li>
<li><strong>Charts</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-5-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Supports various types of charts, including bar charts, line charts, pie charts, scatter plots, and more.</li>
<li><strong>Collaborative Editing</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-6-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Supports multiple users editing a spreadsheet simultaneously. File history and recovering are also provided.</li>
<li><strong>Editing History</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-7-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Allows users to view and restore previous versions of a spreadsheet.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">📝 Univer Docs (rc)</h3><a id="user-content--univer-docs-rc" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📝 Univer Docs (rc)" href="#-univer-docs-rc"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Core Features</strong>: Univer supports core document features, including paragraphs, headings, lists, superscript, subscript, and more.</li>
<li><strong>Lists</strong>: Supports ordered lists, unordered lists, and task lists.</li>
<li><strong>Hyperlinks</strong>: Supports inserting links to external websites, email addresses, and other locations within a document.</li>
<li><strong>Floating Images</strong>: Allows inserting images into a document and supporting text and image layout.</li>
<li><strong>Headers & Footers</strong>: Allows adding headers and footers to a document.</li>
<li><strong>Comments</strong>: Enables adding comments to a document to provide additional information.</li>
<li><strong>Printing</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-8-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Allows printing a document or exporting it to PDF.</li>
<li><strong>Import & Export</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-9-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Supports importing and exporting data in DOCX format.</li>
<li><strong>Collaborative Editing</strong><sup><a href="#user-content-fn-1-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" id="user-content-fnref-1-10-e32a4367ea216295f06d3aabe5d27af6" data-footnote-ref="" aria-describedby="footnote-label">1</a></sup>: Supports multiple users editing a document simultaneously.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">📽️ Univer Slides (Under Development)</h3><a id="user-content-️-univer-slides-under-development" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📽️ Univer Slides (Under Development)" href="#️-univer-slides-under-development"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Core Features</strong>: Univer will support core presentation features, including slides, shapes, text, images, and more.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🌐 Internationalization</h2><a id="user-content--internationalization" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🌐 Internationalization" href="#-internationalization"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Univer supports multiple languages, including:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>ca-ES</code></li>
<li><code>en-US</code></li>
<li><code>es-ES</code></li>
<li><code>fa-IR</code></li>
<li><code>ja-JP</code></li>
<li><code>ko-KR</code></li>
<li><code>ru-RU</code></li>
<li><code>sk-SK</code></li>
<li><code>vi-VN</code></li>
<li><code>zh-CN</code></li>
<li><code>zh-TW</code></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><code>zh-CN</code> and <code>en-US</code> are officially supported, while the others are contributed and maintained by the community.</p>
<p dir="auto">You can add the language you want by <a href="https://docs.univer.ai/guides/sheets/getting-started/i18n#custom-language-packs" rel="nofollow">Using Custom Locales</a>. You can also help us add new language support by referring to the <a href="/dream-num/univer/blob/dev/CONTRIBUTING.md">contribution guide</a>.</p>

<p dir="auto">We appreciate any kinds of contributing. You can submit <a href="https://github.com/dream-num/univer/issues">issues or feature requests</a> to us. Please read our <a href="/dream-num/univer/blob/dev/CONTRIBUTING.md">contributing guide</a> first.</p>
<p dir="auto">If you would like to contribute code to Univer, please refer to the contributing guide as well. It would guide you through the process of setting up the development environment and submitting a pull request.</p>

  <h2 class="tmp-mb-3 h4">About</h2>

      <p class="f4 tmp-my-3">
